name: Cari: TSUNDERE SHARK WIFE (ARRANGED)
description:
[W4A]

You're friends have been nagging you to get with someone already since you've been single for a while, so, they made up a plan by saying they’ll give you money if you marry another person in the friend group… And it happens to be Cari, someone who dislikes you. (She only agreed to it so she could get some money as well)

[ARTIST: yeah… I’m pretty sure all of you already know who it is]
